mapper.select: SELECT o.id, i.name as ietName, o.money, o.data FROM oce_info o INNER JOIN iet i ON i.id = o.iet WHERE o.pid = #{pid}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO oce_info (id, pid, source, iet, money, data) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.pid}, #{item.source}, #{item.iet}, #{item.money}, #{item.data})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iet WHERE id = #{id}
